prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on aniline (C₆H₅NH₂, 14 atoms) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (closed-shell singlet), via PySCF through the chemkit frontier-orbitals skill. Geometry was taken as-is from the user-supplied .xyz file (single point, not re-optimized at this level). SCF converged in 9 cycles. No warnings were reported (clean run). Integrity status: trustworthy = true, all checks passed.

Key results:
- HOMO energy: −5.553772 eV (orbital index 24)
- LUMO energy: −0.2489544 eV (orbital index 25)
- HOMO–LUMO gap (headline value): 5.3048177 eV
- Total energy: −287.71578 Hartree (−7829.1453 eV)

Koopmans-theorem derived properties: vertical IP = 5.5538 eV, vertical EA = 0.2490 eV, electronegativity = 2.9014 eV, chemical hardness = 2.6524 eV, chemical softness = 0.3770 eV⁻¹, electrophilicity index = 1.5868 eV.

Live log: /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/argo_claude-sonnet-4.6/20260707-213850_aniline_frontier_orbitals/frontier_20260707-213901.out

CLI invocation: /home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz
